Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy

Class VotingPluginWire

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.VotingPluginWire
public final class VotingPluginWire extends Object
Canonical wire format for proxy - backend messages. Rules: - Only JsonEnvelope is sent over the wire (no legacy String[] / delimiters). - All fields are named keys (no numeric indices). - Versioning uses the JsonEnvelope schema as the source of truth. - A "bungeeVersion" field is also included for legacy compatibility checks. - Values are written as native types where possible, but readers tolerate Strings. Note: Some keys are public because other classes (e.g. MultiProxyHandler) reference them directly.

    • clearVote

      public static com.bencodez.simpleapi.servercomm.codec.JsonEnvelope clearVote(String uuid, String player, String server)
      Sent by non-primary servers to ask the primary to clear vote state. Primary responds by broadcasting ClearVotePrimary.

    • clearVotePrimary

      public static com.bencodez.simpleapi.servercomm.codec.JsonEnvelope clearVotePrimary(String uuid, String player, String server)
      Broadcast by the primary server so all proxies clear vote state.
